confidence_rationale: Clear identification that this is an educational/promotional video showing instrument demonstrations rather than FLS task performance. No Penrose drain, suture materials, or laparoscopic trainer visible.

Suture placement accuracy - no suturing demonstrated

Drain assessment - no Penrose drain present
Any FLS scoring metrics - this is educational content not task performance
technique_summary: This video contains educational demonstration of laparoscopic instruments (needle drivers and knot pusher) but does not show actual FLS Task 4 performance. No scoring can be applied as no task was executed.
strengths: Clear instrument demonstration for educational purposes
improvement_suggestions: Video should show actual FLS Task 4 performance with Penrose drain and suture materials for scoring assessment
